name: Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 3 packages (8 oz each) cream cheese, softened
1 package (6 oz) semi-sweet chocolate pieces, melted
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cookie crumbs and 1/4 cup melted margarine; press into bottom of 9-inch springform pan.
2. In a large bowl, combine cream cheese and milk. Mix until well blended.
3. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
4. Blend in chocolate and vanilla extract; pour over crust.
5. Bake at 300°F for 1 hour and 10 minutes.
6. Loosen cake from the rim of the pan; cool before removing the rim.
7. In another bowl, beat 1/3 cup margarine and sugar until light and fluffy.
8. Add chocolate pieces and liqueur, mixing well.
9. Frost top and sides of cheesecake. Chill.
